error.default:
An error has occured, please try again
`{error}`
error.unbannable: Either my role is too low to ban this user or they have some sort of magical power.
error.noPermission: You don't have the permission to use this command
error.notGuild: Commands can only be executed within a server.
error.commandError: There was an error while executing this command!

devmode.warning: Dev mode has been enabled, expect extra logs!
devmode.commanduseusenotguild: {command} command has been used. The user cannot be determined (command was likely not used within a guild)
devmode.autocompleteuse: User {username} has used the {command} command's autocomplete!
devmode.guildadd: The bot has been added to a guild named {guildname} with an ID of {guildid}!
devmode.guildaddunavailable: The bot has been added to a guild named {guildname} with an ID of {guildid}, however it is unavailable!
devmode.guildremove: The bot has been added to a guild named {guildname} with an ID of {guildid}!
devmode.guildremoveunavailable: The bot has been added to a guild named {guildname} with an ID of {guildid}, however it is unavailable!
